allow: Bash(sed -i 's|Toptan çorap ve iç giyim. Belino+ B2B portal · Türkiye merkezli.|Toptan perde, tül ve ev tekstili. DEMFIRAT B2B portal · Türkiye merkezli.|g' tr.json)
Bash(sed -i 's|Wholesale socks & innerwear. Belino+ B2B portal · Turkey based.|Wholesale curtains, tulle & home textile. DEMFIRAT B2B portal · Turkey based.|g' en.json)

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('products count:', len\(d.get\('products', []\)\)\); print\('first product keys:', list\(d['products'][0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\('products'\) else 'NO PRODUCTS'\)")
